_components.$content:
Electroshock weapons are a special kind of plasma weapon. Unlike most energy weapons, they have extremely high Armour Penetration and no Armour Destruction, and do not inflict a lot of direct damage. However, they inflict considerable amounts of Stun and EMP damage, making them useful for capturing living aliens or destroying mechanical units.

Electroshock weapons tend to destabilize quickly in atmosphere, resulting in very short optimal ranges and a more rapid accuracy/damage dropoff than ballistic weapons. Additionally, they have considerably less ammo than plasma weapons, and cannot be upgraded further.

This electroshock rifle has a range dropoff of 12.5% (ballistics are 10%).
